channel.title: TechTonic Times
channel.description: Science, Technology, AI, Space and Future Tech News

item.title: NASA Quantum Sensors Could Replace GPS Forever
item.description: NASA is developing quantum sensors that may allow navigation without GPS signals, potentially transforming aerospace and defense systems.

item.title: The First Injection Designed by AI Has Reached Human Trials
item.description: Can artificial intelligence help create vaccines faster and more effectively? Human testing has begun.

item.title: No Charging Needed? This Nuclear Battery Could Last for Decades
item.description: Could nuclear battery technology eliminate frequent charging and battery replacements? Researchers believe it may have long-term applications.

item.title: Scientists Create New Solar Material Using Abundant Elements
item.description: A new solar technology could reduce dependence on scarce materials while maintaining competitive energy efficiency.

item.title: Humanoid Robots Are Learning Tasks Faster Than Expected
item.description: Advances in AI training methods are allowing humanoid robots to acquire real-world skills at an accelerating pace.
